entities.name: MULTI-OMICS
entities.description: Integration of multiple omics data such as genomics, proteomics, and metabolomics

entities.name: HIGH-THROUGHPUT PHENOTYPING
entities.description: Automated and rapid measurement of plant traits

entities.description: Biochemical and molecular processes that allow plants to resist pests

entities.name: PLANT-INSECT INTERACTIONS
entities.description: The biological interactions between plants and insects

entities.name: METABOLOMICS
entities.description: The study of small molecule metabolites in a biological system

entities.name: METABOLIC PATHWAYS
entities.description: Series of chemical reactions occurring within a cell

entities.name: INSECT DAMAGE
entities.description: Harm caused to plants by insect pests

entities.name: PROTEOMICS
entities.description: The large-scale study of proteins

entities.name: PROTEIN EXPRESSION
entities.description: The process by which information from a gene is used in the synthesis of a functional protein

entities.name: PLANT DEFENSE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to protect itself from pests or diseases

entities.name: MACHINE LEARNING
entities.description: Algorithms that allow computers to learn from and make predictions on data

entities.name: ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE
entities.description: Simulation of human intelligence processes by machines

entities.name: PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The capacity of a plant to withstand or repel insect pests

entities.name: METABOLIC AND PROTEOMIC PROFILES
entities.description: The combined set of metabolites and proteins present in a sample

entities.name: DEEP LEARNING
entities.description: A subset of machine learning based on artificial neural networks

entities.name: STRESS FACTORS
entities.description: Environmental or biological pressures affecting plant growth and health

entities.name: IMAGING PLATFORMS
entities.description: Technologies used to capture visual data of plants

entities.name: SENSOR TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Devices used to detect and measure physical or chemical properties

entities.name: INSECT PESTS
entities.description: Insects that cause economic damage to crops

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Farming practices that are environmentally sound and economically viable

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: Reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: BIOMARKERS
entities.description: Biological molecules that serve as indicators of a biological state or condition
